case_title: VERNON FRISON VS. EASY SHIPPING 24/7 LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-08-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-08-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF VERNON FRISON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EASY SHIPPING 24/7 LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY AHMED SHAMS, PARTNER WITH WITNESS SIWITA AINAYTULLAH, OPERATIONS MANAGER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAIVEES SERVICE ISSUES. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $350.00 FILED BY FRISON, VERNON AS TO DEFENDANT EASY SHIPPING 24/7 LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2022 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRISON, VERNON
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT EASY SHIPPING 24/7 LLC
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF FRISON, VERNON
